message.content:
Read the PDF file at "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\1cellAssembleMachine\기존 프로젝트 전 파일 내보내기 한거.pdf" and extract ALL pin map / I/O mapping information. This is a PLC project export from XG5000. I need:

1. All input module slots and their pin assignments (which physical I/O point maps to which address like %IX0.0.0, _00_IN00 etc.)
2. All output module slots and their pin assignments
3. Any special module info (servo, communication etc.)
4. The base/slot structure

Read ALL pages of the PDF - don't skip any. Extract every I/O point name and address you can find. Format the results as a structured table.

Also extract any variable declarations, program names, and global variables if present.

content.content:
Exit code 2
/usr/bin/bash: eval: line 1: unexpected EOF while looking for matching `"'

content.text: I/O 파라미터 섹션을 찾았습니다. 핵심 구간을 더 읽겠습니다.
이제 P 디바이스(물리 I/O)의 핀맵 변수 섹션을 찾겠습니다.
이제 이미 추출된 정보와 기존 IO_MAP_DETAIL.md 파일을 확인하겠습니다.
